{{Infobox madra
| name = Life aura
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

''See also: [[Life aura Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Life [[aura]], also referred to as [[vital aura]], is a vibrant green energy that can be perceived through [[spiritual sight]] or specialized [[Copper sight]]. It manifests as a bright, [[emerald]]-like glow that can appear as intense as a bonfire in dense environments. Within an individual, this [[aura]] often exists as a lifeline running down the spine; the thickness and brightness of this line can indicate a person's health, strength, or vitality. This energy is fundamentally connected to the concept of unity, where all aspects of [[aura]] are linked in a continuous cycle. A strong concentration of [[vital aura]] can facilitate faster and safer advancement during the cycling process. Furthermore, [[life]] [[aura]] serves a protective function, reacting automatically to shield a person from death [[aura]]. In certain specialized locations, such as the [[Life Well]], this energy can be used to bolster an individual's internal lifeline or even restore youth. While it is a source of nourishment and empowerment, damage to the internal lifeline is difficult to repair, though [[life]] [[aura]] can be used to help a person return to fighting shape quickly.}}

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Life aura]] can make vines and trees look like an [[emerald]] bonfire.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c1">''Skysworn'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Ghostwater ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Life aura]] is one of the components in the balance required for [[Riverseeds]] to be born.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c12">''Ghostwater'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Life Well]] bolsters the line of [[life]] [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15">''Ghostwater'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Life aura]] is a type of energy [[Yerin]] can control.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10">''Underlord'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Infusions of [[life]] [[aura]] can help stabilize a damaged lifeline.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c12">''Underlord'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Scripts direct [[life]] [[aura]] to [[Orthos]] to regenerate his wounds.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4">''Reaper'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|A garden sustains a fruit using [[life]] [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Emriss uses [[life]] [[aura]] to accelerate natural healing.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30">''Waybound'', chapter 30</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Life aura]] can be strengthened through specific forest scripting.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c9">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Her training “room” was an open circle of forest scripted to make the life aura as strong as possible, so an owl wasn’t at all out of place.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c9" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
